mapper.sql: id,parent_id,name, path,component,icon, type,order_num, status,visible,create_time, update_time,remark,create_by, update_by,del_flag
mapper.select: SELECT sm.id, sm.`name`, sm.icon, sm.path, sm.component, sm.parent_id AS "parentId", sm.visible FROM sys_menu sm JOIN sys_role_menu srm ON sm.id = srm.menu_id AND sm.del_flag = '0' JOIN sys_role sr ON srm.role_id = sr.id AND sr.del_flag = '0' JOIN sys_user_role sur ON sur.role_id = sr.id WHERE sur.user_id = #{userId} AND sm.status = 1 AND sm.type IN ('0', '1') ORDER BY sm.order_num
SELECT sm.id, sm.parent_id, sm.`name`, sm.path, sm.component, sm.icon, sm.type, sm.order_num, sm.`status`, sm.visible, sm.remark FROM `sys_menu` sm WHERE sm.del_flag = '0' AND sm.id = #{id}

SELECT sm.`id` FROM sys_menu sm WHERE sm.del_flag = '0' AND sm.parent_id IN
#{item}
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_menu SET status = 1 WHERE del_flag = '0' AND id = #{id}
UPDATE sys_menu SET status = 0 WHERE del_flag = '0' AND id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT sm.id, sm.`name` FROM sys_menu sm WHERE sm.del_flag = '0' AND sm.type = #{type}
SELECT sm.id, sm.name, sm.parent_id FROM sys_menu sm WHERE sm.del_flag = '0' AND sm.status = 1 AND sm.type IN ('0','1')
SELECT srm.menu_id AS id FROM sys_role_menu srm JOIN sys_menu sm ON srm.menu_id = sm.id AND sm.`type` = '1' WHERE srm.role_id = #{roleId}
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_menu SET visible = 1 WHERE del_flag = '0' AND id = #{id}
UPDATE sys_menu SET visible = 0 WHERE del_flag = '0' AND id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT sm.id, sm.`name`, sm.icon, sm.path, sm.component, sm.parent_id AS "parentId" FROM sys_menu sm JOIN sys_role_menu srm ON sm.id = srm.menu_id AND sm.del_flag = '0' JOIN sys_role sr ON srm.role_id = sr.id AND sr.del_flag = '0' JOIN sys_user_role sur ON sur.role_id = sr.id WHERE sur.user_id = #{userId} AND sm.status = 1 AND sm.visible = 1 AND sm.type IN ('0', '1') ORDER BY sm.order_num
